arts.ttl: Luis Diaz offers huge hint over Liverpool future amid Barcelona interest
arts.sum: Luis Diaz discusses his affinity for Liverpool amid speculation over a possible transfer to Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Mallorca Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Barcelona, currently top of La Liga, host Mallorca, who are pushing for a European spot. The match is scheduled for April 22, 2025, at 20:30 GMT. Barcelona vs Mallorca Form Barcelona are in excellen...

arts.ttl: Thanks to Flick and young stars, Barcelona are fun again as they eye trophy treble
arts.sum: The financial issues still remain for Barcelona, but they're back to their brilliant best on the pitch as LaLiga, Copa del Rey and Champions League are all still within reach.
Lamine Yamal, Laureus World Breakthrough of the Year - FC Barcelona Barça send a letter to LaLiga to move up Valladolid match - Mundo Deportivo

arts.ttl: Manchester United player wants to join Barcelona – Not letting go of ambition
arts.sum: Barcelona were interested in Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford before his loan move to Aston Villa in the winter market. A ‘confidential’ report from Tuesday’s edition of Sport talks about the forward’s firm desire to join the La Liga side. Their title says the Manchester United owned player ‘still wants to come’ to Barcelona. Within the report, The post Manchester United player wants to join Barcelona – Not letting go of ambition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: How VAR has dramatically changed LaLiga standings: Real Madrid vs Barcelona
arts.sum: The Video Assistant Referee, aka VAR, has taken center stage in LaLiga this season, and with six rounds to go, the number of interventions is on pace to break the all-time record . After the most recent round, Real Madrid and Villarreal voiced outrage over controversial decisions.

arts.ttl: Raphinha Spotted Pouring Water on Ball Before Taking Barcelona Penalty - Here’s Why
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha was spotted pouring a bottle of water on the ball before taking penalty against Celta Vigo - the reason why has now emerged.

arts.ttl: Flick focuses on Ferran after Barca lose Lewandowski to injury
arts.sum: The forward was spotted having a long one-on-one chat with manager Hansi Flick in training on Monday ahead of Tuesday’s clash against Real Mallorca. More goals will be needed during the run-in, and Flick is backing the Spain international to deliver over the next few weeks.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Mallorca: La Liga
arts.sum: Ferran Torres should replace the injured Robert Lewandowski in the lineup when Barcelona host Mallorca in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Tah confirms Bayer Leverkusen exit amid Barca transfer talk
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah has confirmed he is set to leave Bayer Leverkusen in the summer and has made the club aware of his decision. He’s now confirmed that he is into his final few months as a Leverkusen player.
